allow: Bash(mysql -uroot -proot -h127.0.0.1 -e "USE edu_saas; SELECT version, description, success FROM flyway_schema_history;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -h127.0.0.1 -e "SHOW DATABASES; USE edu_saas; SHOW TABLES; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS history_rows FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='edu_saas' AND table_name='flyway_schema_history';")
Bash(mysql -uroot -h127.0.0.1 -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS edu_saas DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -h127.0.0.1 -e "USE edu_saas; SELECT version, success FROM flyway_schema_history; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS tables_count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='edu_saas';")
Bash(mysql -uroot -h127.0.0.1 -e "USE edu_saas; SELECT COUNT\(*\) accounts FROM account; SELECT COUNT\(*\) menus FROM menu_permission;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -h127.0.0.1 -e "USE edu_saas; SELECT permission_code FROM menu_permission WHERE permission_code LIKE '%contract%' OR permission_code LIKE '%notification%' OR permission_code LIKE '%attendance%' OR permission_code LIKE '%report%' OR permission_code LIKE '%schedule%';")

Bash(grep -rh "RequirePermission\(\\"" edu-api/src/main/java | sed 's/.*"\\\(.*\\\)".*/\\1/' | sort -u > /tmp/needed.txt; grep -o "'[a-z-]*:[a-z-]*:[a-z-]*'" edu-api/src/main/resources/db/seed.sql | tr -d "'" | sort -u > /tmp/seeded.txt; comm -23 /tmp/needed.txt /tmp/seeded.txt)
Bash(mysql -uroot -h127.0.0.1 -e "USE edu_saas; SELECT COUNT\(*\) perms FROM menu_permission; SELECT COUNT\(*\) role_perms FROM role_permission WHERE role_id=3001;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -h127.0.0.1 -e "USE edu_saas; SHOW COLUMNS FROM class_enrollment; SHOW COLUMNS FROM class_group;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -h127.0.0.1 -e "USE edu_saas; SHOW COLUMNS FROM course_product;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -h127.0.0.1 -e "USE edu_saas; SHOW COLUMNS FROM enrollment_order_item;")
